name: M365 Compromised Account Remediation
summary: Contain a compromised Microsoft 365 account and generate an incident dashboard.
description: Runs the approved compromised-account workflow against one or more target users, authenticates by device code, performs the selected review or remediation actions, and exports an HTML dashboard into the toolbox output folder.
outputs: Writes an HTML incident dashboard plus supporting CSV and log artifacts to the configured output directory.

actionProfiles.label: Review Only
actionProfiles.description: Collect recent sign-ins, MFA, inbox rule, forwarding, delegate, and audit evidence without changing tenant state.

actionProfiles.label: Containment
actionProfiles.description: Apply a fast containment bundle for active account compromise, including sign-out, password reset, mailbox cleanup, and protocol lock-down.

fields.label: Tenant ID or Domain
fields.helpText: Optional. If provided, device-code sign-in is scoped to this tenant.

fields.label: Export per-user incident package
fields.helpText: Creates a predictable folder per target with supporting CSV, log, and summary files.

prerequisites: PowerShell 7 and backend Microsoft Graph modules available in the execution container
Microsoft 365 admin sign-in by device code when prompted
Microsoft Graph permissions required by the selected workflow

examples.title: Default tenant-wide run
examples.description: Use the default field values and authenticate when the device-code prompt appears.

examples.title: Scoped admin review
examples.description: Provide a tenant id or domain to scope authentication to the expected Microsoft 365 tenant.
